sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: LA Water Heaters collects personal information you voluntarily provide when requesting estimates, scheduling service, or contacting us — including your name, phone, email, and service address.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to provide water heater services, schedule appointments, send service confirmations, process payments, and improve our services. We never sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: Your Rights (CCPA)
sections.body: California residents have the right to request access to, deletion of, and opt-out of the sale of their personal information under the CCPA. Contact us at lawaterheaters@gmail.com to exercise these rights.

sections.heading: Contact Us
sections.body: Questions about this policy? Contact us at lawaterheaters@gmail.com or call (818) 555-0173.
